Blog Posts ​

Hello World - My First Blog Post

2026/05/17 Generalintroductionblog

Hello World ​

Welcome to my personal blog! This is my first post using VitePress.

What is VitePress? ​

VitePress is a Vue-powered static site generator built on top of Vite. It's fast, lightweight, and perfect for blogs.

Features ​

  • Fast: Built on Vite for instant hot module replacement
  • Markdown: Write content in Markdown with Vue enhancements
  • Dark Mode: Built-in dark mode support
  • Search: Local search functionality

What's Next? ​

Stay tuned for more posts about:

  1. Web development tutorials
  2. Open source projects
  3. Technical insights

Read more →

Getting Started with VitePress

2026/05/17 Tutorialvitepressvuestatic-site

Getting Started with VitePress ​

VitePress is a powerful static site generator built on Vue and Vite.

Installation ​

bash
npm install -D vitepress

Configuration ​

Create .vitepress/config.ts:

typescript
export default {
  title: 'My Site',
  description: 'A VitePress site'
}

Writing Content ​

Use Markdown with Vue enhancements:

  • Custom components
  • Syntax highlighting
  • Math equations

Deployment ​

VitePress can be deployed to:

  • Vercel
  • Netlify
  • GitHub Pages
  • Cloudflare Pages

Read more →

10 Web Development Tips

2026/05/17 Tipsjavascriptcssproductivity

10 Web Development Tips ​

Here are some useful tips for web developers.

1. Use CSS Custom Properties ​

css
:root {
  --primary-color: #646cff;
}

.button {
  background: var(--primary-color);
}

2. Destructure in Function Parameters ​

javascript
function greet({ name, age }) {
  console.log(`Hello ${name}, age ${age}`)
}

3. Use Optional Chaining ​

javascript
const city = user?.address?.city

4. Template Literals for Multi-line ​

javascript
const html = `
  <div>
    <h1>${title}</h1>
  </div>
`

5. Console.table for Arrays ​

javascript
console.table(users)
